ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the article was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is published */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the article */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the article */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_categories" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the keyword */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the keyword */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the keyword is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_keywords" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "summary_text" TEXT /* Summary text */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the summary */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the summary */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the summary is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_summaries_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., video, image) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media item */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the media */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the media */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the media is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the engagement record */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the engagement record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the engagement record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., journalist, editor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the article */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access log is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_content" TEXT /* Content of the article version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_updates_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the rating */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the rating */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the source */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
